title: NPC Trainer Connections [Cobblemon]
description: Allows for easy connection between NPC mods and CobbleTrainers.
body:
Adds the following

- commands to initiate an interface that can trigger commands, set up to resemble a dialogue box.
- debug commands to modify the mod and generate datapack templates
- VS. Seeker item to be used for rematches, is charged by equipping in your trinket's belt slot and walking/running around.

Required on Client and Server

datapack structure:
[datapack]/data/npctc/trainerdata/[trainer_id].json

place trainers in the above path to add them. must be within the npctc folder or will not be detected.
